hero.title: Data Scientist
hero.desc: From predictive maintenance to computer vision, from large language models to production deployment — I design and ship end-to-end AI solutions.
about.label: About
about.title: Turning data into strategic advantage.
about.desc: From Istanbul to New York, from municipalities to legal tech — I've delivered AI solutions across scales and industries.
about.e1.title: Predictive Maintenance & IoT
about.e1.desc: Failure prediction models from sensor data. Field-tested across metropolitan municipality bus fleets.
about.e2.title: Computer Vision
about.e2.desc: Traffic density analysis, pedestrian flow detection, document structure recognition, and OCR solutions.
about.e3.title: LLM & NLP
about.e3.desc: Model fine-tuning, legal document classification, content segmentation, and embedding extraction.
about.e4.title: MLOps & Deployment
about.e4.desc: Reliable model deployment via FastAPI, gRPC, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.
about.s1.title: Transportation & Smart City
about.s1.desc: İBB, Burulaş, Eshot, İzotaş — IoT-based predictive maintenance for bus fleets
about.s2.title: International Collaboration
about.s2.desc: NYC Department of Transportation — traffic density, pedestrian flow, and vehicle classification
about.s3.title: Legal Technology
about.s3.desc: Legal document classification and automated document analysis using transformer models
about.s4.title: Document Intelligence & OCR
about.s4.desc: Automatic recognition of document components including headers, tables, graphics, and images

experience.title: Career history.
experience.desc: Professional experience in data science and AI across multiple industries.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Selected works.
projects.desc: A cross-section of my open-source and research-focused projects.
projects.p1.desc: Natural language SQL querying. LangChain, OpenAI Function Calling, and MSSQL integration.
projects.p2.desc: Multimodal document search and visual understanding. ColPali + Qwen2-VL on FastAPI.
projects.p3.desc: Fine-tuning and memory optimization of Meta's quantized DINOv3 model.
projects.p4.title: KAG, CAG, and RAG Comparison
projects.p4.desc: Comparative analysis of LLM augmentation approaches.
projects.p5.desc: Market basket analysis and product recommendation engine using the Apriori algorithm.
projects.p6.desc: Addressing overfitting in MART ensembles through dropout regularization.
